Key differences:

- Distractor 1 has the right three columns filled (also vertical stripes but different)
- Distractor 2 has horizontal stripes (rows 1 and 4 filled)

content.text: Expression: Three vertical stripes in columns 2, 3, and 5, with empty columns at positions 1 and 4
